name: Dayma Itamunoala
title: Senior Vice President, Sales Representative
bio: Dayma leads the Colliers Ontario Multifamily Team, one of the most active apartment investment sales practices in the country. Recognized as a leading specialist in the disposition of multifamily property across Ontario, Dayma has personally transacted over $1.2 billion in apartment buildings, working with all tiers of capital including institutions, pension funds, REITs, developers, family offices, and private investors. A member of the Federation of Rental-Housing Providers of Ontario (FRPO), his practice spans the full spectrum of multifamily product from 10-unit walk-ups to 1,000+ suite institutional portfolios. Dayma publishes a widely followed weekly newsletter read by over 14,000 multifamily professionals.

name: Zoe Prachter
title: Transaction Manager
bio: Zoe is the Transaction Manager for the Colliers Ontario Multifamily Team, where she plays a central role in the execution of every mandate from listing through closing. She manages the full lifecycle of each transaction, including marketing coordination, data room management, offer analysis, due diligence oversight, and client communication. A licensed Sales Representative with RECO, Zoe actively participates in property tours, negotiations, and buyer engagement. She oversees the team's brand and marketing strategy, ensuring every listing receives institutional-quality positioning. Prior to Colliers, Zoe studied at Toronto Metropolitan University (Ryerson).

name: Yianni Tsiampas
title: Sales Representative
bio: Yianni is a Sales Representative on the Colliers Ontario Multifamily Team, focused on origination, client development, and expanding the team's reach across Ontario's apartment markets. He works directly with property owners on valuations and listing proposals, and maintains active relationships with a broad network of private and institutional buyers. Yianni plays a lead role in the team's outreach initiatives and buyer engagement programs, helping to generate the competitive bid depth that drives strong outcomes for sellers.

name: Chris Bertucci
title: Sales Representative
bio: Chris is a Sales Representative on the Colliers Ontario Multifamily Team, specializing in buyer advisory and investment analysis. He works closely with purchasers and investors to identify acquisition opportunities that align with their portfolio objectives, and supports the team's underwriting and market research efforts. Chris brings a detail-oriented approach to transaction execution and is actively involved in due diligence coordination and deal structuring across the team's Ontario-wide mandate.

name: Aman Rana
title: Seniors Housing Advisor
bio: Aman focuses exclusively on seniors housing investment sales within the Colliers Ontario Multifamily Team, covering retirement residences, long-term care facilities, and assisted living properties across the province. He works with operators, developers, and institutional investors navigating an asset class experiencing significant tailwinds from Canada's demographic shift, rising occupancies above 90%, and constrained new supply. Aman brings specialized sector knowledge to every engagement, including an understanding of the regulatory frameworks, licensing requirements, and operational nuances unique to seniors housing.
